mapper.select: SELECT t.*, usj.subject_name AS "subject_name", uf.FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME AS "file_name" FROM ( SELECT um.member_number AS "member_number", um.member_id AS "member_id", um.member_name AS "member_name", um.member_nickname AS "member_nickname", um.member_gender AS "member_gender", um.member_phone AS "member_phone", um.member_type AS "member_type", um.member_state AS "member_state", usmtr.grad_school AS "mtr_grad_school", usmtr.grad_depart AS "mtr_grad_depart", usmtr.grad_score AS "mtr_grad_score", usmte.mentee_school AS "mte_school", usmte.mentee_grade AS "mte_grade", usmte.mentee_hopeuni AS "mte_hope_uni", usmte.mentee_hopemajor AS "mte_hope_major", us.SURVEY_TYPE AS "survey_type", us.FILE_NUMBER AS "file_number", NVL(usmtr.subject_number, usmte.subject_number) AS "subject_number" FROM UB_MEMBER um LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTEE usmte ON um.survey_number = usmte.survey_number LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR usmtr ON um.survey_number = usmtr.survey_number LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SURVEY us ON um.survey_number = us.SURVEY_NUMBER AND us.SURVEY_APPROVAL = 'P' ) t LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_SUBJECT usj ON t."subject_number" = usj.subject_number AND usj.subject_status = '활성' LEFT OUTER JOIN UB_FILE uf ON t."file_number" = uf.FILE_NUMBER WHERE t."member_number" = #{memberNumber}
